tool_definitions.name: memory_recall
tool_definitions.description: Recall persisted memories for session start. Scans the memory directory, scores by salience, selects within token budget, and returns formatted memories.

steps.message: Use the memory_recall tool to recall all persisted memories for session start. Report what memories were found, how many were selected, and whether the recall was truncated or degraded.

results.content: The memory recall tool found 3 memories. 3 memories were selected and formatted. The recall was not truncated or degraded. The memories include information about testing feedback, user role, and project goals.
